title: Star Martial God Technique [Xing Wushen Jue] Episode 63 Subtitle
description:
Around the world there are twelve paths to climb the Tower of God, and in legend these twelfth paths lead to the legendary path of immortality. But the path in this Tower of God is, too long, endless. In ancient times there were many types of martial arts, unfortunately the world under terrible change, and only three remained: Fire, Dragon and Star Martial Arts. This generation of experts from these three martial arts are looking for a path to immortality. This is the story of a Star martial arts practitioner who begins his life journey with two beautiful girls by his side, planning to become the Great God...

Star Martial God Technique [Xing Wushen Jue] Season 2, Star Martial God Technique [Xing Wushen Jue]
